name: 15_system_b_met_zero_to_one
description: Branch 3 / System B: bleed condition met, prev bleed_ticks=0 increments to 1, no bleed_broken (1 < threshold). System A fails (reset).
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 0.0 >= cross 2.0 is FALSE -> vwap_ticks reset to 0. is_vwap_broken False. System B: current_return -1.5 <= bleed_arm -1.0 is TRUE -> new_bleed_ticks = 0+1 = 1. is_vwap_bleed_broken = (1 >= threshold 3) = False. Returns (0, 1, False, False).
